title: Plating
description: At the end of your turn, gain [gold]Block[/gold]. [gold]Plating[/gold] is reduced by [blue]1[/blue] at the start of your turn.
smart_description: At the end of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold]. [gold]Plating[/gold] is reduced by [blue]1[/blue] at the start of your turn.
notes: Amount represents the current stack count and determines block gained per turn. Decrement defaults to 1 per turn but scales with player count in multiplayer (equals number of players when applied by enemies).
